description_long: This radiator features a rectangular, horizontally-oriented body with a series of evenly spaced, parallel horizontal panels forming the main heat-dissipating surface. The exterior is finished in a dark, likely metallic color, giving it a sleek and modern appearance suitable for urban environments. The side views reveal a slim profile, with mounting brackets or pipe connection points protruding slightly from the sides. The top and bottom edges are reinforced with thicker horizontal bars, providing structural stability and a clean, industrial look. The radiator appears to be constructed primarily from metal, likely steel, with a hard, glossy finish that reflects light subtly. No visible control valves or decorative elements are present, emphasizing a utilitarian, functional design.
description: A sleek, dark-colored horizontal radiator with parallel metal panels and a slim, modern profile. It features side mounting points and a glossy, hard finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the radiator with horizontal panels and side mounting points visible.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the radiator's slim profile and the protruding mounting or pipe connection points.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, highlighting the horizontal panel arrangement and structural bars.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile and mounting or pipe connection features.
attribute_pipe_connections: two side entry points, one on each side, horizontally oriented
